title: Alpha Project - Milestone Record
content:
Alpha Project Key Milestones:

- Original launch date: March 7
- Actual launch date: March 28 (delayed 3 weeks)
- Original budget: 800K
- Actual cost: 920K (15% overrun)
- Team size: 6 people
- Core deliverables: Customer management system + Data dashboard

Major events during the project:
1. Feb 15: Client requested new mobile requirements (not in original plan)
2. Feb 22: Third-party payment API approval was rejected, resubmitted
3. Mar 5: Integration testing found data sync bug, fix took 1 week

title: Alpha Project - Team Feedback Summary
content:
Team Feedback (collected anonymously):

Positive:
- Good team collaboration atmosphere
- Correct technical architecture decisions
- Timely client communication

Needs improvement:
- Requirement changes lack formal process
- Test environment setup was too late
- Documentation updates not timely
- Code review process not strictly enforced
